reviews.comment:
Todo bien, impecables los baños, pero cuando quise salir no andaba el pulsador y la puerta no abría, así q me pasé unos cuantos minutos golpeando la puerta, gracias al señor de seguridad q me vino a rescatar🤣🤣🤣🤦🏽‍♀️🤦🏽‍♀️🤦🏽‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, the bathrooms were spotless, but when I wanted to leave the button wasn't working and the door wouldn't open, so I spent a few minutes banging on the door, thanks to the security guard who came to rescue me 🤣🤣🤣🤦🏽‍♀️🤦🏽‍♀️🤦🏽‍♀️

reviews.comment:
Fui a sacar el registro de conducir internacional. La atencion fue burnísima y lo destaco xq no suele ocurrir. Claros, con sonrisas y buena onda. Quienes me atendieron hicieron la difefñrencia

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my international driving permit. The service was excellent, and I want to emphasize that because it doesn't usually happen. They were clear, friendly, and had a great attitude. The people who helped me made all the difference.
